scripts.build: npm run build -w @youtube-discord-presence/shared && npm run build -w @youtube-discord-presence/native-host && npm run build -w @youtube-discord-presence/extension
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @youtube-discord-presence/shared && npm run typecheck -w @youtube-discord-presence/native-host && npm run typecheck -w @youtube-discord-presence/extension
